default_variables
#

variables.ts view source

{ name: string; light?: string | undefined; dark?: string | undefined; summary?: string | undefined; }[] import {default_variables} from '@fuzdev/fuz_css/variables.js';

These are implicitly the variables for the base theme. See also the empty variables array of the base theme in themes.ts.
